name: Sugar Cookies/State Fair of Texas
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg and beat well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients and blend until just combined.
4. Roll the dough into 1-inch rolls and place on waxed paper.
5. Chill in the refrigerator until firm, about 30 minutes.
6. Slice into half-inch slices.
7. Sprinkle the tops with sugar and a dash of nutmeg.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes.
